meaning: n.澶撮グ,楦熺殑鍐犳瘺,椤堕
examples: The head is surmounted by a topknot of long silky hair.
The hair on the muzzle is a little darker shade than the topknot.
His hair is tied in a topknot and He has earrings, bracelets and armlets.
After changing into a striped T-shirt and slim cargo pants, she sits on the couch, kicks off her clogs and gathers her famously lush red hair into a topknot.
